requirement_topic.en: Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) — Household Refrigerators (GSO MEPS under DGSM)
requirement_topic.zh: 最低能效标准（MEPS）——家用电冰箱（DGSM下的GSO最低能效标准）
requirement_topic.zht: 最低能效標準（MEPS）——家用電冰箱（DGSM下的GSO最低能效標準）

summary.en: Refrigerators sold in Oman must meet the Gulf (GSO/GCC) minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) for household refrigerating appliances, administered in Oman by DGSM under MOCIIP. The GCC energy-efficiency scheme for refrigerators (GSO refrigerator energy-efficiency standard, commonly cited as GSO 2530 and the related GCC energy-label/MEPS measures) sets a minimum energy-efficiency threshold below which a model may not be registered or placed on the market, and defines the energy-efficiency star rating used on the label. The energy-efficiency index is derived from rated volume, climate category, and the GSO test/calculation methodology (aligned with the IEC 62552 measurement family). A model that does not meet the MEPS floor cannot obtain a DGSM energy registration and therefore cannot be cleared for import. Measurements should reflect the Omani 240 V, 50 Hz supply.
summary.zh: 在阿曼销售的电冰箱须满足海湾（GSO/海合会）家用制冷器具最低能效标准（MEPS），在阿曼由MOCIIP下属DGSM管理。海合会电冰箱能效制度（GSO电冰箱能效标准，常引用为GSO 2530及相关海合会能效标签／MEPS措施）设定了一个最低能效门槛，低于该门槛的型号不得注册或投放市场，并界定了标签上使用的能效星级评定。能效指数由额定容积、气候类别及GSO试验／计算方法（与IEC 62552测量系列对齐）导出。不满足MEPS下限的型号无法取得DGSM能效注册，因而无法通过进口清关。测量应反映阿曼240 V、50 Hz供电。
summary.zht: 在阿曼銷售的電冰箱須滿足海灣（GSO/海合會）家用製冷器具最低能效標準（MEPS），在阿曼由MOCIIP下屬DGSM管理。海合會電冰箱能效制度（GSO電冰箱能效標準，常引用為GSO 2530及相關海合會能效標籤／MEPS措施）設定了一個最低能效門檻，低於該門檻的型號不得註冊或投放市場，並界定了標籤上使用的能效星級評定。能效指數由額定容積、氣候類別及GSO試驗／計算方法（與IEC 62552測量系列對齊）導出。不滿足MEPS下限的型號無法取得DGSM能效註冊，因而無法通過進口清關。測量應反映阿曼240 V、50 Hz供電。

standards_or_laws: GSO 2530 — Energy efficiency labelling and minimum energy performance requirements for household refrigerating appliances (GCC refrigerator energy-efficiency standard; MEPS floor + star rating)
GSO / GCC energy-efficiency label scheme for electrical appliances — administered in Oman by DGSM (MOCIIP)
GSO IEC 62552 (Household refrigerating appliances — characteristics and test methods) — measurement basis for the energy-efficiency index

summary.en: China's mandatory energy-efficiency standard for household refrigerators is GB 12021.2-2015 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators). It defines energy-efficiency grades (Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 minimum threshold) and minimum annual energy-consumption limits. It is mandatory (GB), enforced by SAMR, with the energy-labelling system administered by the NDRC; products must display the China Energy Label (CEL) before sale. The GB 12021.2 calculation basis and grade scale differ from the GSO MEPS/star methodology — a Chinese Grade 1 or Grade 2 rating does not automatically equal compliance with the GSO MEPS floor and must be recalculated to the GSO methodology.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级）。该标准界定能效等级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量最低限值。该标准为强制性国家标准（GB），由SAMR执行，能效标识制度由NDRC管理；产品在销售前须展示中国能效标识（CEL）。GB 12021.2的计算基准及等级体系与GSO MEPS／星级方法不同——中国1级或2级评定不自动等同于符合GSO MEPS下限，须按GSO方法重新计算。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級）。該標準界定能效等級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量最低限值。該標準為強制性國家標準（GB），由SAMR執行，能效標識制度由NDRC管理；產品在銷售前須展示中國能效標識（CEL）。GB 12021.2的計算基準及等級體系與GSO MEPS／星級方法不同——中國1級或2級評定不自動等同於符合GSO MEPS下限，須按GSO方法重新計算。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances test methods (aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: Two gaps: (1) Methodology and threshold — the GSO MEPS floor and star-rating index use a different reference-consumption formula and climate categorisation than GB 12021.2-2015. A model rated Grade 1/2 in China must have its energy-efficiency index recalculated to the GSO methodology to confirm it clears the GSO MEPS floor; some China-tuned models may fall below the Gulf MEPS threshold and be rejected at registration. (2) Test conditions — GSO testing references the IEC 62552 family at the Omani 240 V, 50 Hz supply and the Gulf climate category (high ambient temperatures), which can materially change measured consumption versus China's 220 V test conditions; existing GB 12021.2 / GB/T 8059 reports usually cannot be reused without re-testing or recalculation at the GSO reference conditions. There is no GSO database registration that mirrors any Chinese export obligation — the energy registration is a fresh Omani/Gulf step.
gap.zh: 两项差距：（1）方法与门槛——GSO MEPS下限及星级指数使用的参考耗电量公式和气候分类与GB 12021.2-2015不同。在中国评为1／2级的型号须按GSO方法重新计算其能效指数，以确认是否越过GSO MEPS下限；某些针对中国调校的型号可能低于海湾MEPS门槛而在注册时被拒。（2）试验条件——GSO检测引用IEC 62552系列，并采用阿曼240 V、50 Hz供电及海湾气候类别（高环境温度），相较中国220 V试验条件可能显著改变测得耗电量；现有GB 12021.2／GB/T 8059报告通常须在GSO参考条件下重新检测或重新计算方可使用。GSO没有对应任何中国出口义务的数据库注册——能效注册是全新的阿曼／海湾步骤。
gap.zht: 兩項差距：（1）方法與門檻——GSO MEPS下限及星級指數使用的參考耗電量公式和氣候分類與GB 12021.2-2015不同。在中國評為1／2級的型號須按GSO方法重新計算其能效指數，以確認是否越過GSO MEPS下限；某些針對中國調校的型號可能低於海灣MEPS門檻而在註冊時被拒。（2）試驗條件——GSO檢測引用IEC 62552系列，並採用阿曼240 V、50 Hz供電及海灣氣候類別（高環境溫度），相較中國220 V試驗條件可能顯著改變測得耗電量；現有GB 12021.2／GB/T 8059報告通常須在GSO參考條件下重新檢測或重新計算方可使用。GSO沒有對應任何中國出口義務的數據庫註冊——能效註冊是全新的阿曼／海灣步驟。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — meeting the GSO/GCC refrigerator MEPS floor (GSO 2530) is a precondition for DGSM energy registration and import clearance into Oman
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The GSO/GCC refrigerator MEPS floor (GSO 2530) is a hard gate for Oman: a model below the threshold cannot obtain DGSM energy registration. Chinese GB 12021.2 grades do not substitute — the energy-efficiency index must be recalculated to the GSO methodology at Gulf test conditions (IEC 62552, 240 V / 50 Hz, high-ambient climate category) before registration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GSO/海合会电冰箱MEPS下限（GSO 2530）是阿曼的强制性门槛：低于门槛的型号无法取得DGSM能效注册。中国GB 12021.2等级不能替代——须在海湾试验条件下（IEC 62552、240 V／50 Hz、高环境温度气候类别）按GSO方法重新计算能效指数后方可注册。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GSO/海合會電冰箱MEPS下限（GSO 2530）是阿曼的強制性門檻：低於門檻的型號無法取得DGSM能效註冊。中國GB 12021.2等級不能替代——須在海灣試驗條件下（IEC 62552、240 V／50 Hz、高環境溫度氣候類別）按GSO方法重新計算能效指數後方可註冊。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Label — GCC Energy-Efficiency Label / Star Rating (GSO scheme via DGSM)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标签——海合会能效标签／星级评定（经DGSM的GSO制度）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標籤——海合會能效標籤／星級評定（經DGSM的GSO制度）

summary.en: Refrigerators placed on the Omani market must bear the GCC (GSO) energy-efficiency label, which displays a star rating (the higher the number of stars, the more efficient) together with annual energy consumption and rated volume. The label is part of the GSO/GCC energy-efficiency scheme (GSO 2530 and related label measures) and is administered in Oman by DGSM under MOCIIP. Before the label may be affixed, the model must be tested to the GSO methodology (IEC 62552 family) and registered/approved through the DGSM conformity scheme — in practice handled by the in-country importer of record. The label content, format, and Arabic-language requirements are defined by the GSO measures. The energy registration links to the broader DGSM product conformity certificate (see market-access rows).
summary.zh: 投放阿曼市场的电冰箱须附贴海合会（GSO）能效标签，标注星级评定（星数越多越高效）以及年耗电量和额定容积。该标签属于GSO/海合会能效制度（GSO 2530及相关标签措施）的一部分，在阿曼由MOCIIP下属DGSM管理。在加贴标签前，型号须按GSO方法（IEC 62552系列）检测并经DGSM符合性制度注册／核准——实务上由境内进口商（importer of record）办理。标签内容、格式及阿拉伯语要求由GSO措施界定。能效注册与更广泛的DGSM产品符合性证书关联（见市场准入行）。
summary.zht: 投放阿曼市場的電冰箱須附貼海合會（GSO）能效標籤，標注星級評定（星數越多越高效）以及年耗電量和額定容積。該標籤屬於GSO/海合會能效制度（GSO 2530及相關標籤措施）的一部分，在阿曼由MOCIIP下屬DGSM管理。在加貼標籤前，型號須按GSO方法（IEC 62552系列）檢測並經DGSM符合性制度註冊／核准——實務上由境內進口商（importer of record）辦理。標籤內容、格式及阿拉伯語要求由GSO措施界定。能效註冊與更廣泛的DGSM產品符合性證書關聯（見市場准入行）。

standards_or_laws: GSO 2530 — Energy efficiency labelling and minimum energy performance requirements for household refrigerating appliances (star-rating label + MEPS)
GSO / GCC energy-efficiency label scheme — Arabic-language label content and format; administered in Oman by DGSM (MOCIIP)
GSO IEC 62552 — measurement basis for the labelled energy-efficiency values

summary.en: China's energy labelling for household refrigerators is the China Energy Label (CEL) under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR, 2016 revision), displaying a 1-to-5 grade scale (1 highest) and annual energy consumption. Labels are administered by the China National Institute of Standardization (CNIS) under NDRC/SAMR; manufacturers self-declare the grade based on GB 12021.2 testing. The Chinese CEL (1-to-5 grade, Chinese-language) is structurally different from the GCC star-rating label and is not cross-comparable; it cannot serve as the Omani label.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的能效标识为依据《能源效率标识管理办法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修订版）实施的中国能效标识（CEL），展示1至5级评级（1级最高）及年耗电量。标识由NDRC/SAMR下属的中国标准化研究院（CNIS）管理；制造商依据GB 12021.2检测结果自我声明等级。中国能效标识（1至5级、中文）与海合会星级标签结构不同，不可直接比较；不能充当阿曼标签。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的能效標識為依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修訂版）實施的中國能效標識（CEL），展示1至5級評級（1級最高）及年耗電量。標識由NDRC/SAMR下屬的中國標準化研究院（CNIS）管理；製造商依據GB 12021.2檢測結果自我聲明等級。中國能效標識（1至5級、中文）與海合會星級標籤結構不同，不可直接比較；不能充當阿曼標籤。

standards_or_laws: Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR 2016 revision) — China Energy Label framework
GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (underlying grade standard)

gap.en: Two mandatory actions with no usable Chinese substitute: (1) GCC star-rating label — the Arabic-language GSO energy label (star rating + annual kWh + volume) must be produced, approved, and affixed per the GSO format; the Chinese 1-to-5 grade CEL cannot be reused. (2) GSO registration/approval — the labelled values must come from GSO-methodology testing (IEC 62552 at Gulf reference conditions) and be approved through the DGSM scheme via the importer; a self-declared Chinese grade is not accepted. The star value also depends on clearing the GSO MEPS floor (see frigom-energy-001), so a China-tuned model may both fail MEPS and require re-labelling. Importers/distributors should confirm the current GSO label format and any star-rating revisions before printing labels.
gap.zh: 两项强制性要求且无可用的中国替代：（1）海合会星级标签——须按GSO格式制作、核准并加贴阿拉伯语GSO能效标签（星级＋年耗电量＋容积）；中国1至5级能效标识不能复用。（2）GSO注册／核准——标注值须来自GSO方法检测（海湾参考条件下的IEC 62552）并经DGSM制度由进口商核准；中国自我声明等级不被接受。星级数值还取决于是否越过GSO MEPS下限（见frigom-energy-001），故针对中国调校的型号可能既不满足MEPS又须重新标识。进口商／经销商在印制标签前应确认当前GSO标签格式及任何星级修订。
gap.zht: 兩項強制性要求且無可用的中國替代：（1）海合會星級標籤——須按GSO格式製作、核准並加貼阿拉伯語GSO能效標籤（星級＋年耗電量＋容積）；中國1至5級能效標識不能複用。（2）GSO註冊／核准——標注值須來自GSO方法檢測（海灣參考條件下的IEC 62552）並經DGSM制度由進口商核准；中國自我聲明等級不被接受。星級數值還取決於是否越過GSO MEPS下限（見frigom-energy-001），故針對中國調校的型號可能既不滿足MEPS又須重新標識。進口商／經銷商在印製標籤前應確認當前GSO標籤格式及任何星級修訂。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — the GCC (GSO) energy-efficiency label must be affixed before sale in Oman, with labelled values from GSO-methodology testing and DGSM approval via the importer
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label display required before sale in China under NDRC/SAMR Measures; based on GB 12021.2-2015

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The GCC (GSO) star-rating energy label is mandatory for refrigerators sold in Oman and must carry GSO-methodology values approved through the DGSM scheme via the in-country importer. The Chinese 1-to-5 China Energy Label does not satisfy the Omani labelling obligation; a fresh Arabic GSO label and energy registration are required, and the model must clear the GSO MEPS floor.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 海合会（GSO）星级能效标签是在阿曼销售电冰箱的强制要求，须载有经DGSM制度由境内进口商核准的GSO方法数值。中国1至5级能效标识不满足阿曼标识义务；须制作全新的阿拉伯语GSO标签并完成能效注册，且型号须越过GSO MEPS下限。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 海合會（GSO）星級能效標籤是在阿曼銷售電冰箱的強制要求，須載有經DGSM制度由境內進口商核准的GSO方法數值。中國1至5級能效標識不滿足阿曼標識義務；須製作全新的阿拉伯語GSO標籤並完成能效註冊，且型號須越過GSO MEPS下限。
